items.question_zh: 自主度是否匹配爆炸半径 × 可逆性 × 反馈质量？
items.question_en: Is autonomy matched to blast radius × reversibility × feedback quality?

items.question_zh: 高风险动作（权限/支付/数据迁移/删除/生产/公共 API）是否人在循环内？
是否最小权限 + 沙箱 + dev-only 凭据 + 网络白名单？
items.question_en: Least privilege + sandbox + dev-only creds + network allowlist?

items.question_zh: 危险命令是否需人工确认？
items.question_en: Do destructive commands require human confirmation?

items.question_zh: 是否禁止未说明理由地删除/弱化测试（防奖励作弊）？
items.question_en: Is deleting/weakening tests without justification forbidden (anti reward-hacking)?

items.question_zh: 是否检查 diff 而不仅是绿色检查（防 harness 认证错误代码）？
items.question_en: Is the diff inspected, not just the green check (anti harness certifying wrong code)?

items.question_zh: 新依赖与安装的 skills 是否经过审计（可信来源）？
items.question_en: Are new dependencies and installed skills audited (trusted sources)?

items.question_zh: 是否有测试/日志/CI 给循环『眼睛』，否则不要无人值守？
items.question_en: Are there tests/logs/CI to give the loop eyes — else do not run unattended?
